projectDescription: A lightweight, gesture-driven SwiftUI side menu component with edge-swipe navigation, environment-based customization, and zero dependencies.
keyFeatures: Gesture-driven side menu with axis locking — works alongside ScrollView, List, and Form
Configurable edge detection zone to avoid conflicts with interactive content
Tap-to-dismiss overlay with customizable color and opacity
Matches device display corner radius for a native look
All appearance settings exposed via SwiftUI environment modifiers
SlideMenuButton reads the toggle action from the environment — no bindings needed
Zero external dependencies, Swift Package Manager distribution
